channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-22 15:46 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: “I just want to live long enough to see the mass driver on the moon. Because that’s going to be incr...
item.description: “I just want to live long enough to see the mass driver on the moon. Because that’s going to be incredibly epic.” —@ElonMusktonight

item.title: @elonmusk: Can’t have a more exciting vision for the future!! Come join us to make this the reality. To the sta...
item.description: Can’t have a more exciting vision for the future!! Come join us to make this the reality. To the stars, let’s go ✨

item.title: @elonmusk: TERAFAB: the next step to becoming a galactic civilization Together with@Tesla&@xAI, we're building ...
item.description: TERAFAB: the next step to becoming a galactic civilization Together with@Tesla&@xAI, we're building the largest chip manufacturing facility ever (1TW/year) – combining logic, memory & advanced packaging under one roof

item.title: @elonmusk: In case you were wondering, the green circle is where orbital data centers start to become profitabl...
item.description: In case you were wondering, the green circle is where orbital data centers start to become profitable.

item.title: @elonmusk: In order to understand the universe, you must explore the universe →x.ai/careers
item.description: In order to understand the universe, you must explore the universe →x.ai/careers

item.title: @elonmusk: How could you not be excited about the future! This is what Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI are building, abu...
item.description: How could you not be excited about the future! This is what Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI are building, abundance for all!

item.title: @elonmusk: The fatal error of the West is the belief that we can weaken and change our culture while retaining ...
item.description: The fatal error of the West is the belief that we can weaken and change our culture while retaining all the benefits of that culture - liberty, prosperity, trust and technology. No cultural identity, no cultural benefits!

item.title: @elonmusk: This felt like the beginning of a movie. Civilizations greatest endeavor accelerates now.
item.description: This felt like the beginning of a movie. Civilizations greatest endeavor accelerates now.

item.title: @elonmusk: Thanks Elon. Extraordinary event tonight. Your vision is powerful and we are proud of all you do in ...
item.description: Thanks Elon. Extraordinary event tonight. Your vision is powerful and we are proud of all you do in Texas.

item.title: @elonmusk: cmon this is mental. terawatt chip factory, orbital solar, mass drivers on the moon, millions of hum...
item.description: cmon this is mental. terawatt chip factory, orbital solar, mass drivers on the moon, millions of humanoid robots insane what weaponized autism can do making the future look like the future again

item.title: @elonmusk: The entire world’s electricity consumption is roughly 3–4 terawatts. 1 petawatt = 250–330 times all ...
item.description: The entire world’s electricity consumption is roughly 3–4 terawatts. 1 petawatt = 250–330 times all the electricity humanity uses at any moment. A single lightning bolt is in the terawatt range. About 1,000 simultaneous bolts is needed to hit 1 petawatt. This is world changing project.

item.title: @elonmusk: my brain can’t process this information
item.description: my brain can’t process this information

item.title: @elonmusk: Happy Birthday Giga Berlin! 4 years ago, we started production with delivering the first 30 cars to ...
item.description: Happy Birthday Giga Berlin! 4 years ago, we started production with delivering the first 30 cars to our customers! Since then, it has been a unique success story: - produced and delivered more than 700.000 Model Y 💪🏼 - created nearly 11.000 jobs 👷‍♂️👩‍🔧 So much more to come!

item.title: @elonmusk: Engineers in the factory - essential to Elon’s vision. “In a single building, we can create a mask, ...
item.description: Engineers in the factory - essential to Elon’s vision. “In a single building, we can create a mask, make the chip, test the chip, make another mask, and have a fast recursive loop for improving the chip design. … Try wild and crazy things, which you can do if you've got that fast iteration loop … to make it, test it and then change the design." His sense of how to make innovation quick, efficient, speedy, effective, and fast is so far ahead. Also rapid. Shorten the iteration loop. Remove roadblocks.

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceXAI + Tesla TERAFAB Project Goal is a trillion watts of compute/year Most must necessarily go t...
item.description: SpaceXAI + Tesla TERAFAB Project Goal is a trillion watts of compute/year Most must necessarily go to space, as US electricity is only 0.5TW
